# Code Anchors: Application Shell

- `apps/prime/src/main.tsx` — mounts the shell at the app root.
- `apps/prime/src/app/app.tsx` — app entry that renders the shell.
- `apps/prime/src/app/layout/app-shell.tsx` — the full-height frame: top strip over the dominant terminal, with the theme and overlay providers and the peek drawer composed in.
- `apps/prime/src/app/header/top-strip.tsx` — the persistent top strip (epic identity, rail, tools cluster).
- `apps/prime/src/app/terminal/terminal-region.tsx` — the dominant terminal region and its stubbed placeholder interior with input line.
